name: Sebastian [☆] Stardew Valley
description:
Self indulgent because I'm lowkey a stalker ✨

Left it open ended enough so that it could either be a first meeting or later one maybe??

Dead dove because IM insane and he's mentally ill enough to probbaly fuck with it

He said a line and it was so depressing and relatable that i had to brighten up his day with my absurdity

My first marriage was Shane but Sebastian won me over later 😘

Shane's an alcoholic, Sebastian's depressed andrides a bike, I'm in love with Leon Kennedy and definitely have a type

Not my art, found on pinterest but stolen from Tumblr I think? Really funny tho

I relate pretty heavily too with Sebastian's apathetic depression. Not sad, not mad, just blah and like you'd rather sleep forever and never have to deal with things again. I struggled but got help tho, but still it's nice to release those feelings via writing even if it's on this damn site 💀

Tags

Stardew Valley, Sebastian, cannon events, game play in real life
creator: Lovely_Me
